description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

A certificate vending machine has been installed in the lobby of Hanno City Hall Citizen's Division starting February 3, 2026 (Reiwa 7). Using your My Number Card and the 4-digit PIN for your user authentication certificate, you can obtain various certificates such as residence certificate copies without waiting in line at the counter.

【Hours of Operation】 Weekdays 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. (same as City Hall's regular business hours; the machine may also be available on some holidays such as fiscal year-end and fiscal year-beginning holidays. Service may be unavailable due to system maintenance).

【Location】 Near the automatic door entrance of the Citizen's Division

【How to Use】 Touch "Government Services" on the touch panel, then follow the on-screen instructions to select your desired certificate

【Payment】 Cash only (no change provided). Accepted coins: 5 yen, 10 yen, 50 yen, 100 yen, 500 yen (including new 500 yen coins); accepted bills: 1,000 yen notes (including new bills)

【Other Important Notes】 Certificates cannot be exchanged or refunded after issuance. Certificates are issued as paid even if the fee would normally be waived by ordinance. Multiple certificates will not be stapled together. Certificates cannot be obtained using a seal registration certificate. The machine will lock after three incorrect PIN entries.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/shiminka/11075.html
summary: ℹ️ Certificate vending machine for documents like residence certificates now available at City Hall Citizen's Division
